settings.heading: Birthday Parties
settings.subheading: The ultimate football birthday experience for kids and adults on the Gold Coast.

settings.label: PARTY PACKAGES
settings.heading: Choose Your Party Package
settings.subheading: Celebrate in style at Gold Coast's only cage football facility. We handle the football — you handle the fun.
settings.note: Custom packages available on request. Contact us for corporate events, team-building, and large group bookings.

settings.title: Kick-Off Party
settings.subtitle: 1 hour court hire + 30 min party area

settings.title: Ultimate Party
settings.subtitle: 1.5 hour court hire + 45 min party area

settings.title: VIP Experience
settings.subtitle: 2 hour court hire + 1 hour party area

settings.title: Private Court
settings.description: Your own enclosed cage court for the duration of the party.

settings.title: Balls & Bibs
settings.description: Quality match balls and team bibs supplied for every party.

settings.title: Party Area
settings.description: Dedicated space for cake, presents, and celebrations.

settings.title: Party Host
settings.description: A dedicated host to run games and keep the fun going.

settings.title: Free Parking
settings.description: Plenty of free parking for all your guests.

settings.title: All-Weather
settings.description: Enclosed courts mean the party goes ahead rain or shine.

settings.label: HOW TO BOOK
settings.heading: Book Your Party
settings.subheading: Planning the ultimate football party is easy.

settings.title: Choose Your Package
settings.description: Pick from our Kick-Off, Ultimate, or VIP packages above.

settings.title: Call or Message Us
settings.description: Contact us to confirm your date, time, and any special requests.

settings.title: Party Time!
settings.description: Show up with the birthday crew. We handle everything else.

settings.heading: Ready to Book a Party?
settings.subheading: Call us or send a message to lock in your date.
